ETag.description: An identifier for a specific version of a resource. It lets caches be more efficient and save bandwidth, as a web server does not need to resend a full response if the content has not changed.

Content-Disposition.description: A header indicating that the content is expected to be displayed as an attachment, that is downloaded and saved locally.

Last-Modified.description: The date and time at which the origin server believes the resource was last modified.
